description: Wall time, peak GPU memory, and reproducibility script are now included in the Data section. E.g., enumeration for {1,3} to 1e11 took 2.7 hours (wall-clock), with 72% aggregate GPU utilization, and full logs are archived at the provided link. A self-contained verification script (verify_denominator.py) generates the bitset and checks 1,000 random denominators against an independent CF implementation.
action_taken: Wall time, peak GPU memory, and reproducibility script are now included in the Data section. E.g., enumeration for {1,3} to 1e11 took 2.7 hours (wall-clock), with 72% aggregate GPU utilization, and full logs are archived at the provided link. A self-contained verification script (verify_denominator.py) generates the bitset and checks 1,000 random denominators against an independent CF implementation.
